CustomField.description: Auto Calculates by comparing the Annual Income (Eligibility) to the Moderate, Low, and Very Low Income Limit fields. Click the Update Income Limits button to populate those fields.
CustomField.formula:
IF(OR( ISBLANK(Very_Low_Income_Limit__c), ISBLANK(Low_Income_Limit__c), ISBLANK(Moderate_Income_Limit__c)), "Click Update Income Limits Button",
IF( HOMEtracker__Annual_Income_Eligibility__c <= Very_Low_Income_Limit__c, "Very Low",
IF(AND( HOMEtracker__Annual_Income_Eligibility__c > Very_Low_Income_Limit__c, HOMEtracker__Annual_Income_Eligibility__c <= Low_Income_Limit__c), "Low",
IF(AND( HOMEtracker__Annual_Income_Eligibility__c > Low_Income_Limit__c, HOMEtracker__Annual_Income_Eligibility__c <= Moderate_Income_Limit__c), "Moderate",
IF( HOMEtracker__Annual_Income_Eligibility__c > Moderate_Income_Limit__c, "Over Income",
"Ineligible")))))
CustomField.inlineHelpText: Auto Calculates by comparing the Annual Income (Eligibility) to the Moderate, Low, and Very Low Income Limit fields. Click the Update Income Limits button to populate those fields.
CustomField.label: Income Determination
